title: Chat colors
description: Brings some color into the Minecraft chat!
body:
Chat colors

💬🌈 Brings some color into the Minecraft chat! 🌈💬

This mod colors every player's messages for easier reading! the colors persist between sessions --- ## Features - Colors player's names, preferably uses the locator's bar colors ![macuguita with a pink color in the chat says "Come find me!" and Ladybrine with blue color says "I can see you on the locator bar… -_-" the locator bar is visible and macuguita appears pink like his text on the chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b793e865d67d53131b5ca5217c6905123eb3256.png) - You can disable coloring player's names to distinguishing them better from the body of the message ![macuguita's username appears on chat as white while his text appears as pink, macuguita says on chat "This sky is beautiful" while looking at the sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afd0d095ef802cfc2ca44aeb6693ab918c2a5e68.png) - The locator bar colors can be disabled to use the mod's custom algorithm that allows for more colors (255 colors in total!) ![macuguita with a blue color on the chat says "Beautiful flowers!" while looking a minecraft wildflowers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf053e7201bbdf69a47eb6a8e665ed79e6a25dc9.webp) - You can disable chat coloring for yourself so you can see your own messages with the server's default colors ![Ladybrine joins the server and macuguita with white colors on the chat says "Hey there!" Ladybrine with a blue chat color answers "hi"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/455e59f6118aa3e21ea676b096b3dd6a666e3738.webp) --- ## Support If you encounter any issues or have suggestions, feel free to: - Open an issue on GitHub. - Send me a DM on Discord @macuguita - You are free to use this mod in any Modpack in this platform --- ## Credits - Developer: macuguita - [FormatUtils.java](https://github.com/macuguita/chatcolors/blob/main/src/main/java/dev/terminalmc/chatnotify/util/text/FormatUtil.java) developer: [TerminalMC](https://github.com/macuguita/chatcolors/blob/main/NOTICE)
